title: DAVID Archive — generation-side neutral lighting + color-cast QA (blue-starvation fix)

diagnosis.symptom: Visibly sallow/yellow-green Archive host; post-grade re-render unchanged pixels
diagnosis.root_cause: Generation source is blue-starved — host B≈8/255, B/R≈0.09. Post-grade cannot inject blue that was never rendered.
diagnosis.false_pass_trap: Legacy yellow-green gate (g>r bias) passed proof at yg_max=0.007 while 68/68 frames visibly cast
diagnosis.prompt_root_cause: 3200K-global amber locks in Set_Library, identity refs, and per-shot video_prompts — lamp specified as KEY not localized accent

work_scope: Finalize QA-metric spec (#244) — rgb_skew + blue_starvation + generation_reference gate
Lock neutral lighting prompt blocks (#243 → #218) — identity + set + per-shot
Purge warm-global strings from Latin script + template scripts
Wire C4 R8 gate + render_longform QA to shared color_cast_qa.py
Document legacy_false_pass_cohort (+66 frames) — yg≤0.012 while grey_drift≥0.20

blue_starvation_fraction.formula: fraction of valid host pixels where (B<40) OR (B<R×0.35)

legacy_yellow_green.note: RETAINED but demoted — misses B-starved warm cast

qa_metric_spec.acceptance_proof: 68/68 bad frames FAIL new gate; archive_set_reference.jpg PASSES generation_reference_passes()

kelvin_stack.lamp_placement: desk quadrant only — NOT face, NOT shelves, NOT full frame

lighting_prompt_spec.david_identity_lock: LIGHTING LOCK @David-001 (#243): neutral balanced 5000K white key on face, neck, and charcoal sweater — natural documentary skin with intact blue channel (B≥40/255 mids, B/R≥0.35); soft 5200K shelf-bounce ≤25%; brass lamp 3200K tight desk accent ≤30% frame; NEVER global amber wash; no blue-starved shadows; no yellow-green cast; no magenta ambient.
lighting_prompt_spec.archive_set_lock: LIGHTING LOCK @Set-Archive-001 (#243): neutral balanced 5000K ambient key — blue preserved in skin/shadow mids; 5200K shelf bounce ≤25%; brass lamp 3200K localized desk pool only (≈lower-right 40%); NOT full-frame amber gel; NOT global wash on face/shelves.
lighting_prompt_spec.shared_per_shot_clause: Neutral balanced 5000K ambient key on host — blue channel intact; brass lamp 3200K localized warm pool on desk quadrant only; soft 5200K shelf bounce ≤25%; no yellow-green cast; no blue-starved shadows.
purge_strings: Warm gold brass desk lamp 3200K key light locked
amber pool only on desk and face

steps.action: Freeze color_cast_qa.py thresholds + document +66 false-pass cohort
steps.output: tests/test_color_cast_metric.py green + C4 gate doc update

steps.action: Apply shared lighting clause to Latin script shots 01–08; purge warm-global strings
Propagate neutral locks to documentary-host templates + dead-language corpus scripts
steps.output: No 3200K-global key remains in generation prompts

steps.action: Add pre-render reference still gate (avatar + set plate) via generation_reference_passes
steps.output: CLI or render_longform preflight hook — blocks i2v if Bμ<40

steps.action: Sign off spec → unblock T1 test render (single shot 01_cold_open)
steps.output: T1 go: --force-shot 01_cold_open only after reference gate passes

downstream.T1_pass_criteria: generation_reference_passes on segment still: Bμ≥40, B/R≥0.35, blue_starvation≤0.30
